name: Apple Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350°F.
For the Cake:
1. In a large bowl, combine oil and sugar at medium speed of an electric mixer.
2. Add eggs and beat well.
3. Combine baking powder, salt, baking soda, nutmeg, ground ginger with flour; add to oil mixture.
4. Beat until just blended.
5. Stir in chopped apples.
6. Spread batter evenly in an ungreased 9 x 9 x 2-inch pan.
For the Topping:
1. In a small bowl, combine granulated sugar, finely chopped walnuts, and cinnamon.
Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Cut into 3 x 2-1/4-inch rectangles.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
